concerns.text: FR-004b requires flagging 'high drift' ONLY if block permutation p-value < 0.05. Task T018 ('Implement high drift flagging logic') is placed in Phase 4 (US2) but depends on the p-value generation from T020 (Null Model Baseline) or T023 (Block Permutation Test) which are also in Phase 4/5. T018 lacks a dependency or instruction to wait for the significance test results, creating a logical gap where the flagging logic cannot execute correctly without the p-value source.

FR-003b mandates skipping windows with R² < 0.8. Task T014 ('Implement window iteration loop') describes processing 'all 6+ windows' but does not explicitly include the logic to integrate the R² skip check (defined in T012) into the loop iteration. Without explicit instruction, the loop may process invalid windows, violating FR-003b.

FR-007 requires generating a Null Model Baseline by shuffling window order. Task T020 implements this, but FR-004b (US2) requires using the p-value from this baseline to flag 'high drift'. The tasks for US2 (T016-T020) are grouped, but T018 (flagging) logically depends on T020 (baseline generation). The current task list does not explicitly link T018's execution to the completion of T020, risking a missing dependency in the implementation flow.

Task T015 ('Add error handling for feature variance') addresses an edge case from the spec but does not explicitly reference FR-001 (median imputation) or link to T010. The spec requires imputation *before* checking variance. The task description should clarify that variance checks run on imputed data to ensure data hygiene compliance.

FR-006 mandates outputting a CSV with window ID, timestamp, importance rankings, and drift metrics (rho, tau, p-value). Task T025 ('Integrate all metrics... into final drift_metrics.csv') covers this, but Task T026 ('Implement final report generation in global_stats.json') is not explicitly traced to a Functional Requirement. While useful, it is not mandated by FR-006 or FR-008, representing a potential scope drift unless added as a verification artifact for SC-003.
